heading_content_part: This privacy policy applies to the following apps by keuwlsoft:
Wifi AnalyserThis app also uses Wifi, network and location

permissions (android.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE,      CHANGE_WIFI_STATE, ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE, ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION, ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION) as required for the functionality of the app.This app uses the internet (android.permission.
INTERNET) permission so that we can serve ads and generate a little revenue.In order to deliver the ads, we use the

AdMob SDK from Google.    Please see their terms andprivacy policyfor information on any data they might collect or share.    Also seehttps://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sitesfor a good explanation of how Google uses information from Apps.Personalised ads may or may not be served, depending on your region.  With regards to GDPR, if consenting to personalised ads in the EEU/UK,

AdMob has been configured to source the ads from Google, or one of these Google-certified ad networks, each partner having their own privacy policies:InMobiChartboostironSource MobileFacebookVungleAd ColonyOtherwise, AdMob will serve ads from any of the Google-certified ad networks.It is unclear if the AdMob SDK Version being used in the App will or will not make use the Location permissions mentioned above.  Therefore assume it might use your location for advertising purposes.

Whilst keuwlsoft does not directly collect or store any of your personal or non-personal information,     some anonymous analytical data (e.g. app usage, crash reports and ad effectiveness data) is available to us through AdMob and/or the Google Developer Console.Note that for an older version of this app, we used an SDK from Appbrain,      please see their
terms and privacy policy for information on any data they might collect or share.
